message:
test(cass-types): pin leaf-crate boundary post extraction (ft-u9wm4)

Sister of ft-cui2w (2d0fb9f7) which added the same coverage to the
caut-types leaf. ft-8cg6y (c73c0d13) carved cass plain-data types
into crates/frankenterm-core-cass-types/ and shipped with zero
tests; this commit installs 20 unit tests at the canonical home so
a future change to slug parsing, timestamp helpers, or session
aggregation surfaces a failure here instead of in some downstream
consumer.

Coverage:

  CassAgent (4 tests):
    - as_str round-trip for all 6 variants + Display impl
    - from_slug recognizes canonical + every documented alias
      (claude / claude-code / claude_code, chatgpt / chat-gpt /
      chat_gpt)
    - case-insensitive and whitespace-trim tolerance
    - rejects empty / unknown slugs

  CassError Display (1 test):
    All 7 variants match their thiserror #[error] format strings
    verbatim, including structured-field variants (Timeout,
    NonZeroExit, OutputTooLarge, InvalidJson, NoResults, Io).

  CassExportQuery / CassContentExportQuery (4 tests):
    - Default uses DEFAULT_CASS_EXPORT_LIMIT (1000)
    - effective_limit() substitutes the default for limit==0
      (the connector contract — unbounded fallback would emit
      every recorder session)
    - effective_limit() passes explicit values through
    - CassContentExportQuery same-shape coverage in one combined test

  parse_cass_timestamp_ms (4 tests):
    - epoch seconds vs milliseconds heuristic boundary
    - RFC3339 + zoned offset (-05:00 lands 5h after UTC)
    - plain "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S" / "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%SZ" / RFC3339
      all converge on the same UTC instant
    - garbage / empty / whitespace return None

  CassSessionSummary::from_session (3 tests):
    - role-based token aggregation: user/system → input,
      assistant → output, total = sum
    - returns None for tokens when no message had a token_count
    - unknown roles (e.g. "tool") count toward total but neither
      input nor output — pins RoleClass::Unknown handling

  Serde roundtrip (4 tests):
    - CassSearchResult #[serde(flatten)] extra captures unknown
      vendor-specific keys
    - CassExportSessionRecord round-trip preserves all fields
      including external_meta as serde_json::Value
    - CassExportContentChunk round-trip
    - CassExportQuery round-trip

CassError is not Serialize/Deserialize/Clone/PartialEq (Io and
InvalidJson wrap unstructured strings), so its serde roundtrip is
out of scope for the leaf — Display alone is the externally-visible
contract.

Verified: cargo test -p frankenterm-core-cass-types --lib passes
20/20 in 1.88s on /tmp/ft-swarm-violetmoth-target.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
